message:
fix: resolve gofmt and golangci-lint CI failures

- gofmt: 7 files had formatting issues (dolt.go, close_guard_test.go,
  init_hooks_test.go, discovery_test.go, types.go, metadata_schema_test.go,
  testdoltserver.go)
- gosec G304: suppress false positives for os.ReadFile on trusted paths
  (daemon PID files, test cleanup)
- gosec G104: handle Close() return values with _ = pattern
- errcheck: wrap os.RemoveAll in defer closure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -483,12 +483,12 @@ Use --dry-run to see what would be dropped without actually dropping.`,
 		failures := 0
 		consecutiveTimeouts := 0
 		const (
-			batchSize           = 5  // Drop this many before pausing
-			batchPause          = 2 * time.Second
-			backoffPause        = 10 * time.Second
-			timeoutThreshold    = 3  // Consecutive timeouts before backoff
-			perDropTimeout      = 30 * time.Second
-			maxConsecFailures   = 10 // Stop after this many consecutive failures
+			batchSize         = 5 // Drop this many before pausing
+			batchPause        = 2 * time.Second
+			backoffPause      = 10 * time.Second
+			timeoutThreshold  = 3 // Consecutive timeouts before backoff
+			perDropTimeout    = 30 * time.Second
+			maxConsecFailures = 10 // Stop after this many consecutive failures
 		)
 
 		for i, name := range stale {

@@ -173,7 +173,7 @@ func TestInstallGitHooks_ExistingHookBackup(t *testing.T) {
 func TestHooksNeedUpdate(t *testing.T) {
 	tests := []struct {
 		name           string
-		setupHooks     bool        // whether to create .git/hooks/ with hook files
+		setupHooks     bool // whether to create .git/hooks/ with hook files
 		preCommitBody  string
 		postMergeBody  string
 		skipPostMerge  bool        // skip writing post-merge hook file
@@ -186,38 +186,38 @@ func TestHooksNeedUpdate(t *testing.T) {
 			wantNeedUpdate: false,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "current version hooks",
-			setupHooks: true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
+			name:           "current version hooks",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
 			wantNeedUpdate: false,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "outdated version hooks",

-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
+			name:           "outdated version hooks",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
 			wantNeedUpdate: true,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "inline hooks without version",
-			setupHooks: true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
#
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
#
bd sync --flush-only
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh
#
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
#
bd import
",
+			name:           "inline hooks without version",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
#
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
#
bd sync --flush-only
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
#
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
#
bd import
",
 			wantNeedUpdate: true,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "shim hooks",
-			setupHooks: true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh

exec bd hooks run pre-commit "$@"
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-shim 0.40.0
exec bd hooks run post-merge "$@"
",
+			name:           "shim hooks",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-shim 0.40.0
exec bd hooks run pre-commit "$@"
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-shim 0.40.0
exec bd hooks run post-merge "$@"
",
 			wantNeedUpdate: false,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "non-bd hooks",
-			setupHooks: true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
echo 'custom pre-commit'
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh
echo 'custom post-merge'
",
+			name:           "non-bd hooks",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
echo 'custom pre-commit'
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
echo 'custom post-merge'
",
 			wantNeedUpdate: false,
 		},
 		{
@@ -228,38 +228,38 @@ func TestHooksNeedUpdate(t *testing.T) {

# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0

bd sync --flush-only

-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh

bd import

+			name:           "mixed state: one outdated one current",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
 			wantNeedUpdate: true,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "mixed state: shim and outdated template",
-			setupHooks: true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-shim 0.49.6
exec bd hooks run pre-commit "$@"
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh

",
 			wantNeedUpdate: true,
 		},
 		{
-			name:          "only pre-commit exists",
-			setupHooks:    true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
-			skipPostMerge: true,

+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: 0.40.0
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
+			skipPostMerge:  true,
 			wantNeedUpdate: true,
 		},
 		{
-			name:       "non-executable current version hooks",
-			setupHooks: true,
-			preCommitBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
-			postMergeBody: "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
+			name:           "non-executable current version hooks",
+			setupHooks:     true,
+			preCommitBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) pre-commit hook
bd sync --flush-only
",
+			postMergeBody:  "#!/bin/sh
# bd-hooks-version: " + Version + "
# bd (beads) post-merge hook
bd import
",
 			fileMode:       0644,
 			wantNeedUpdate: false, // hooksNeedUpdate checks version, not permissions
 		},

@@ -12,8 +12,8 @@ func TestProtocol_CyclePreventionBlocks(t *testing.T) {
 	b := w.create("--title", "Chain-B", "--type", "task")
 	c := w.create("--title", "Chain-C", "--type", "task")
 
-	w.run("dep", "add", b, a)            // B depends on A
-	w.run("dep", "add", c, b)            // C depends on B
+	w.run("dep", "add", b, a) // B depends on A
+	w.run("dep", "add", c, b) // C depends on B
 
 	// Adding C→A would create A→B→C→A cycle — must be rejected
 	_, err := w.tryRun("dep", "add", a, c, "--type", "blocks")

@@ -169,16 +169,16 @@ type TeamResponse struct {
 
 // Project represents a project in Linear.
 type Project struct {
-	ID          string `json:"id"`
-	Name        string `json:"name"`
-	Description string `json:"description"`
-	SlugId      string `json:"slugId"`
-	URL         string `json:"url"`
-	State       string `json:"state"` // "planned", "started", "paused", "completed", "canceled"
+	ID          string  `json:"id"`
+	Name        string  `json:"name"`
+	Description string  `json:"description"`
+	SlugId      string  `json:"slugId"`
+	URL         string  `json:"url"`
+	State       string  `json:"state"` // "planned", "started", "paused", "completed", "canceled"
 	Progress    float64 `json:"progress"`
-	CreatedAt   string `json:"createdAt"`
-	UpdatedAt   string `json:"updatedAt"`
-	CompletedAt string `json:"completedAt,omitempty"`
+	CreatedAt   string  `json:"createdAt"`
+	UpdatedAt   string  `json:"updatedAt"`
+	CompletedAt string  `json:"completedAt,omitempty"`
 }
 
 // ProjectsResponse represents the response from projects query.
